title: Supreme Court dismisses PIL seeking directions to ensure Times of India readers get full paper copy
description: The Supreme Court on Monday dismissed a plea seeking directions to ensure that buyers of the Times of India newspaper receive complete copies of the paper, along with all supplements and magazines [GS Rathore v. Union of India and anr].A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta asked the petitioner, one Gauri Shanker Rathore, to take up the issue with his local newspaper hawker instead of moving the top court. “All you have to do is tell your hawker to provide you all the s
